name: Homemade Meatball Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine all ingredients; blend well.
3. Shape mixture into 1 1/2-inch balls.
4. Place meatballs on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake for 25-30 minutes, until browned.
6. Remove meatballs from baking sheets and drain well on paper towels.
7. Cool completely.
8. Divide meatballs into four portions.
9. Place each portion in a 1-quart freezer container, leaving 1/2-inch space at the top.
10. Seal; label with date and contents.
11. Freeze. Use within 3 months.
Makes approximately 80 meatballs.
